title: Your Fault
tmdbOverview: The love between Noah and Nick seems unwavering despite their parents' attempts to separate them. But his job and her entry into college open up their lives to new relationships that will shake the foundations of both their relationship and the Leister family itself.
synopsis: Your Fault (2024) is a drama and romance film from United States and Spain. It has a 5.2 rating on IMDb. It appears on several of our curated Top 10 lists. It carries a 18 certification (BR rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
